projects1.name: সিলিকন রিয়েল এস্টেট (প্রাঃ) লিঃ – কর্পোরেট ওয়েবসাইট
projects1.overview: এটি একটি সম্পূর্ণ কর্পোরেট এবং রিয়েল এস্টেট প্ল্যাটফর্ম যা জমি বিনিয়োগের সুযোগ, চলমান প্রকল্প এবং কোম্পানির নির্ভরযোগ্যতা তুলে ধরার জন্য ডিজাইন করা হয়েছে। ওয়েবসাইটটি সিলিকন রিয়েল এস্টেটের একটি ডিজিটাল স্টোরফ্রন্ট হিসেবে কাজ করে, যা দর্শকদের প্রজেক্টের বিস্তারিত তথ্য, বিনিয়োগের ধারণা এবং সরাসরি যোগাযোগের মাধ্যম প্রদান করে।

architecture.frontend: React.js / Next.js with modular component-based structure
architecture.cms: Custom admin dashboard for project and property management
third_party_integrations: Google Maps API for location mapping
WhatsApp Business API for floating chat
Live chat support (e.g., Tawk.to or Intercom)
architecture.security: SSL encryption, input sanitization, JWT authentication for admin
architecture.performance: Image optimization, lazy loading, CDN, caching strategies

backend: Node.js
Express.js

projects1.role: লিড ফুল-স্ট্যাক ডেভেলপার এবং ইউআই/ইউএক্স ডিজাইনার
responsibilities: Translated client requirements into a detailed sitemap and information architecture
Designed responsive, mobile-first UI using Figma and implemented it with React/Next.js
Developed dynamic project, property, and gallery modules with CMS integration
Built inquiry forms, appointment booking, and interactive floating chat features
Implemented multi-level navigation (Home, About, Projects, Properties, Investment, Services, Gallery, Blog, Careers, Contact) and dedicated sitemap page
Ensured SEO best practices, schema markup, and meta tags for better discoverability
Optimized page speed, Core Web Vitals, and accessibility
Deployed and managed cloud infrastructure with auto-scaling and backups
Provided maintenance, bug fixes, and feature enhancements post-launch
challenges: Client had a broad vision but lacked technical clarity – translated business goals into clear digital pathways
Complex real estate data (plots, flats, projects with multiple attributes) had to be structured for easy filtering and display
Balancing rich visual content (gallery, maps) with fast loading times on both desktop and mobile
Ensuring secure and efficient inquiry handling while maintaining GDPR compliance and user trust
Integrating multiple third-party tools (chat, maps, booking, subscription) without compromising performance
Creating a scalable admin panel to manage content without technical intervention

outcome_profit.business_impact: ওয়েবসাইটটি কোম্পানির অনলাইন উপস্থিতি উল্লেখযোগ্যভাবে উন্নত করেছে, যার ফলে ৩ মাসের মধ্যে লিড জেনারেশন ৪০% বৃদ্ধি পেয়েছে। এর সাজানো সাইটম্যাপ এবং ইউজার জার্নি বাউন্স রেট ২৫% কমিয়েছে।
outcome_profit.client_testimonial: "টিমটি আমাদের ভিশন বুঝতে পেরেছে এবং এমন একটি প্ল্যাটফর্ম তৈরি করেছে যা আমাদের নির্ভরযোগ্যতা ও দক্ষতার প্রতিফলন ঘটায়। ওয়েবসাইটটি এখন আমাদের প্রধান লিড জেনারেশন টুল।" – ম্যানেজিং ডিরেক্টর, সিলিকন রিয়েল এস্টেট (প্রাঃ) লিঃ
outcome_profit.profit_metrics: Direct online booking inquiries increased by 60%. The site enabled better tracking of marketing ROI and streamlined client onboarding. Estimated ROI: 3x within the first year.

main_pages: About Us (Company Overview, Mission & Vision, Chairman Message, Our Team, Company Achievements, Office Gallery, Client Trust & Certifications)
Projects (Ongoing Projects, Project Details Page: Overview, Location Map, Plot Size, Price Information, Amenities, Gallery, Inquiry Form)
Properties (Residential Plots, Commercial Plots, Ready Flat, Land Investment, Featured Properties, Property Details Page)
Investment (Why Invest in Land, Investment Benefits, ROI & Growth, Payment Plan, Investment Consultancy)
Services (Land Buying, Plot Sales, Property Consultation, Legal Documentation Support, Real Estate Marketing, Investment Consultancy)
Gallery (Project Gallery, Construction Gallery, Event Gallery, Office Gallery, Video Gallery)
Blog / News (Real Estate Tips, Investment Guides, Dhaka Property News, Legal Information, Customer Awareness Articles)
Careers (Current Openings, Apply Online, Internship Program, HR Contact)
Contact Us (Contact Form, Office Address, Google Map, Phone Number, WhatsApp Contact, Business Hours)
footer_links: Company (About Us, Our Team, Achievements, Careers, Contact Us)
Properties (Residential Plots, Commercial Plots, Ready Flat, Land Investment, Property Details)
Investment (Why Invest, Benefits, ROI & Growth, Payment Plan, Consultancy)
Services (Land Buying, Plot Sales, Consultation, Legal Support, Marketing, Investment Consultancy)
Resources (Blog/News, Tips, Guides, Legal Information, Awareness Articles)

projects2.name: গিয়ারআপ – স্পোর্টস এবং আউটডোর গিয়ার রেন্টাল প্ল্যাটফর্ম
projects2.tagline: আউটডোর গিয়ার ভাড়া নেওয়ার প্রিমিয়াম প্ল্যাটফর্ম
projects2.overview: গিয়ারআপ হলো আউটডোর এবং স্পোর্টস গিয়ার ভাড়া নেওয়ার জন্য একটি আধুনিক ই-কমার্স সাইট। এতে রিয়েল-টাইম ইনভেন্টরি, সিকিউর চেকআউট এবং ইউজার ফ্রেন্ডলি কার্ট ম্যানেজমেন্ট সিস্টেম রয়েছে যা ব্যবহারকারীদের সহজে গিয়ার বুক করতে সাহায্য করে।

architecture.frontend: N/A (Backend API only – but designed to integrate with React/Next.js frontend)
architecture.backend: Node.js with Express.js – MVC architecture, RESTful API design
architecture.database: PostgreSQL (Relational) with Prisma ORM for type-safe database operations
architecture.authentication: JWT (JSON Web Tokens) with refresh token rotation, bcrypt for password hashing
architecture.email_service: Nodemailer / SendGrid for order confirmations and notifications
architecture.validation: Zod for request validation and type safety
architecture.logging: Winston / Morgan for request logging and error tracking
architecture.hosting: AWS EC2 / Heroku / DigitalOcean with environment configuration
architecture.api_documentation: Swagger/OpenAPI (via Swagger UI) for interactive API docs
third_party_integrations: Google Maps API (for pickup locations – optional)
architecture.security: Helmet.js for security headers, CORS configuration, rate limiting, input sanitization, SQL injection prevention (Prisma), environment variables for secrets
architecture.performance: Redis caching for frequent queries (gear listings, categories), database indexing, pagination, query optimization

responsibilities: Designed the complete database schema with 6+ relational tables (Users, GearItems, Categories, RentalOrders, Payments, Reviews)
Built role-based access control (RBAC) with three distinct user roles (Customer, Provider, Admin)
Implemented secure JWT authentication with access/refresh token strategy
Developed 35+ RESTful API endpoints covering authentication, gear management, rentals, payments, reviews, and admin functions
Integrated Stripe Payment Intents and SSLCommerz for secure payment processing with webhooks
Created comprehensive API documentation using Swagger/OpenAPI with interactive testing interface
Implemented rental order lifecycle management (PLACED → CONFIRMED → PAID → PICKED_UP → RETURNED) with status transition validation
Added search and filtering capabilities (category, price range, brand, availability) for gear browsing
Built provider inventory management system (CRUD operations with stock tracking)
Implemented review system with rating aggregation for gear items
Set up automated email notifications for order confirmations, payment receipts, and status updates
Created database migrations and seeding scripts for development and testing
Wrote unit and integration tests with 85%+ code coverage
Deployed API to production with environment-specific configurations and monitoring
challenges: Designing a flexible rental pricing model that handles hourly, daily, and weekly rates with security deposits
Implementing concurrent booking validation to prevent double-booking of same gear on overlapping dates
Managing complex transaction flows for payments, refunds, and partial payments with two different gateways
Building a robust webhook handler for Stripe/SSLCommerz with idempotency to prevent duplicate processing
Ensuring proper role separation and data isolation (providers can only access their own gear and orders)
Optimizing database queries for high-traffic gear browsing with filters, sorting, and pagination
Handling edge cases like order cancellations, early returns, and late fees
Maintaining data consistency across relational tables with Prisma transactions
Building the payment system to support both Bangladeshi (SSLCommerz) and international (Stripe) customers

outcome_profit.business_impact: গিয়ারআপ প্ল্যাটফর্মটি ব্যবহারকারীদের গিয়ার ভাড়া নেওয়ার প্রক্রিয়াকে সহজ করেছে এবং প্রথম ৬ মাসে প্ল্যাটফর্মের মাধ্যমে ২ হাজারেরও বেশি রেন্টাল সম্পন্ন হয়েছে।
outcome_profit.client_testimonial: "গিয়ারআপ আমাদের ব্যবসাকে পুরোপুরি ডিজিটাল করেছে। ইনভেন্টরি ম্যানেজমেন্ট এবং বুকিং সিস্টেমটি অসাধারণ!" – সিইও, গিয়ারআপ
outcome_profit.profit_metrics: API currently supports 50+ gear providers and 2,000+ active customers. Processed $150,000+ in rental transactions within first 6 months of deployment. The modular design allows easy customization for new features without breaking existing functionality.
key_achievements: 100% uptime during peak seasons with auto-scaling
40% reduction in order processing time through automated status tracking
Zero payment security incidents with PCI-DSS compliant practices
30% faster development speed through reusable service layers and utilities

authentication.description: Register new user (customer/provider) with role selection
Login user, return JWT access & refresh tokens

gear_public.description: Get all gear with filters (category, price range, brand, availability)
Get gear details with specifications, reviews, and availability
Get all gear categories (cycling, camping, fitness, water sports)

rental_orders.description: Create new rental order with gear items, dates, and delivery/pickup preferences
Get user's rental orders with pagination and status filters
Get rental order details with items and payment info
Cancel rental order (if not yet confirmed/paid)

payments.description: Create payment intent/session for a rental order (Stripe/SSLCommerz)
Handle payment webhook callbacks from Stripe/SSLCommerz
Get user's payment history with filters

provider_management.description: Add new gear to provider's inventory
Get provider's inventory with stock levels
Get incoming rental orders for provider
Update rental order status (CONFIRM, PICK_UP, RETURN)

reviews.description: Create review for gear after rental completion
Get all reviews for specific gear
Delete own review (customer) or any review (admin)

admin_management.description: Get all users with pagination and role filters
Get all gear listings across all providers
Get all rental orders for platform overview

relationships: Users have many GearItems (as provider)
Users have many RentalOrders (as customer)
Providers have many RentalOrders (as provider)
GearItems belong to one Category
GearItems belong to one Provider (User)
RentalOrders belong to one Customer (User) and one Provider (User)
RentalOrders have one GearItem
Payments belong to one RentalOrder and one User
Reviews belong to one RentalOrder, one GearItem, and one User

states: CONFIRMED → Provider confirms availability and pickup details
PICKED_UP → Customer picks up the gear
RETURNED → Gear returned, pending final inspection
CANCELLED → Order cancelled (by customer before confirmation or provider)

future_enhancements: Mobile app integration with React Native

projects3.name: কোডা – মিনিমালিস্ট প্রজেক্ট ম্যানেজমেন্ট টুল
projects3.tagline: সফটওয়্যার টিমের জন্য প্রজেক্ট ম্যানেজমেন্ট এবং বাগ ট্র্যাকিং প্ল্যাটফর্ম
projects3.overview: কোডা একটি শক্তিশালী প্রজেক্ট ম্যানেজমেন্ট টুল যা সফটওয়্যার ডেভেলপারদের সহজে বাগ ট্র্যাক করতে এবং প্রজেক্টের কাজগুলো সংগঠিত করতে সাহায্য করে। এটি লিনিয়ার (Linear) এর মতো আধুনিক ডিজাইনে তৈরি করা হয়েছে।

architecture.frontend: Next.js 14 with App Router, Server Components, Client Components for interactivity
architecture.state_management: Zustand for client state, React Query (TanStack Query) for server state and caching
architecture.real_time: WebSockets (Socket.io) + Server-Sent Events for live updates, optimistic UI updates
architecture.backend: Next.js API Routes (Serverless functions) + tRPC for end-to-end type-safe APIs
architecture.database: PostgreSQL with Prisma ORM, Redis for caching and real-time presence
architecture.authentication: NextAuth.js (Auth.js) with credentials, Google, GitHub providers, JWT session strategy
architecture.email: Resend + React Email for transactional emails and notifications
architecture.file_uploads: Uploadthing / AWS S3 for attachments and avatars
architecture.search: Meilisearch / Algolia for full-text search across issues and projects
architecture.analytics: PostHog / Plausible for product analytics, self-hosted option available
architecture.hosting: Vercel (Frontend), AWS RDS (PostgreSQL), Upstash (Redis), Neon DB (optional serverless)
architecture.ci_cd: GitHub Actions with automated testing, linting, and preview deployments
architecture.monitoring: Sentry for error tracking, Logtail for logging, Vercel Analytics for performance

design_system: Tailwind CSS with custom design tokens

responsibilities: Designed the complete product architecture from ground up including data models, API layer, and UI component library
Built 40+ database tables with Prisma including Users, Workspaces, Projects, Issues, Comments, Labels, Cycles, etc.
Implemented real-time collaboration features using WebSockets with presence indicators and live cursors
Created 60+ tRPC endpoints with full type safety between frontend and backend
Developed the core UI components system with 100+ reusable components in Storybook
Built the issue management system with drag-and-drop boards (Kanban), list views, and calendar views
Implemented advanced filtering, sorting, and saved views (custom filters)
Created the sprint/cycle management system with velocity tracking and burndown charts
Built comprehensive user permission system (Workspace Admin, Project Lead, Member, Viewer)
Implemented keyboard shortcuts ecosystem with 50+ shortcuts and command palette (⌘K)
Created the notification system with in-app, email, and web push notifications
Built real-time search with fuzzy matching and filtering
Implemented GitHub integration for two-way sync (issues, commits, PRs)
Designed and implemented dark/light theme with system preference detection
Created the analytics dashboard with 15+ metrics and charts using Recharts
Built the invite system with magic links and role assignment
Implemented the time tracking feature with manual entries and integration with issue transitions
Set up comprehensive testing with 80%+ coverage and E2E tests
Implemented internationalization (i18n) with support for 5 languages
Created the onboarding flow with interactive tutorials and tooltips
Built the AI-powered issue summarization and classification using OpenAI API
challenges: Building a real-time collaborative experience that scales to 50+ concurrent users in a workspace
Optimizing the performance of the issue board with 1000+ issues using virtualization (React Window)
Implementing a robust permission system that supports granular access control at workspace/project/issue level
Handling offline-first capabilities with IndexedDB for seamless experience on unstable networks
Building a rich text editor with slash commands, mentions, emojis, and markdown support (using PlateJS)
Implementing complex issue relationships (blocked by, duplicates, relates to, parents) with cycle detection
Creating the automation engine (when X happens, do Y) with 30+ trigger/action combinations
Building the custom workflow system where teams can define their own status transitions
Optimizing the initial load time with React Server Components, streaming, and progressive hydration
Implementing the import/export system for data migration (CSV, JSON, Jira, Asana)
Building the webhook system for third-party integrations
Creating the embeddable widget for external websites to show issue tracking
Implementing end-to-end encryption for workspace data (enterprise feature)
Building the mobile-first responsive design that works seamlessly on all devices
Implementing the audit log system for compliance tracking

project_management: Projects with customizable fields and workflows
Issues with types (Epic, Story, Bug, Task, Sub-issue)
Calendar view for milestones and deadlines
collaboration: Rich text editor with markdown support
Activity feed with all workspace changes
Live cursors showing who's viewing what
analytics_insights: Cycle reports with burndown and burnup charts
Issue distribution by status, assignee, priority
Team productivity metrics (cycle time, lead time)
user_experience: Offline mode with sync on reconnection

relationships: Workspaces have many WorkspaceMembers
Workspaces have many Projects
Workspaces have many Labels, Workflows, Cycles
Projects belong to one Workspace
Projects have many Issues, Cycles, Members
Issues belong to one Project and one Workspace
Issues have one Assignee (User), one Reporter (User)
Issues have many Comments, Attachments, Labels
Issues can have a parent-child relationship (Sub-issues)
Cycles belong to one Project
Cycles have many Issues through CycleIssues
Workflows belong to one Workspace
Workflows have many States and Transitions
Notifications belong to one User and Workspace
ActivityLogs track all changes across the system

auth.description: Register new user with email/password or OAuth

workspaces.description: Get all workspaces for current user

projects.description: Get projects for workspace or user

issues.description: Get issues with filters, sorting, pagination
Get issue details with comments and attachments

search.description: Global search across issues, projects, and users

frontend: React Server Components to reduce client-side JavaScript
Partial pre-rendering (PPR) for dynamic content
Incremental Static Regeneration (ISR) for static pages
Streaming SSR with Suspense boundaries
Image optimization with next/image
Dynamic imports for code splitting
Virtual scrolling for large lists (1000+ issues)
Debounced search for real-time filtering
Optimistic UI updates for faster perceived performance
Prefetching of likely next actions
Edge caching via Vercel Edge Network
Browser caching strategies for static assets
backend: Database indexing on frequently queried fields
Query optimization with Prisma's include/select
Redis caching for user sessions and frequent queries
Database connection pooling
Batch loading with DataLoader to avoid N+1 queries
WebSocket connection management with room-based broadcasting
Background job processing with BullMQ for heavy tasks
Read replicas for analytics queries
Full-text search with Meilisearch
JSON fields for flexible schemas

security_features: JWT authentication with short-lived access tokens and refresh tokens
Role-based access control (RBAC) at workspace, project, and issue levels
Input validation with Zod and sanitization
CSRF protection with double-submit cookies
Rate limiting (1000 requests per 15 minutes per user)
Helmet.js for security headers
CORS with allowed origins
Content Security Policy (CSP) headers
SQL injection prevention via Prisma ORM
XSS protection through React's built-in sanitization
Secure cookie flags (HttpOnly, Secure, SameSite=Strict)
2FA support (TOTP)
Session management with device tracking
Audit logging for all sensitive actions
Data encryption at rest (database-level)
End-to-end encryption for enterprise workspaces
OAuth integration with Google, GitHub
Brute force protection on auth endpoints
Email verification required for account activation
Password reset flow with expiring tokens

outcome_profit.business_impact: কোডা সারা বিশ্বের ২০০টিরও বেশি টিম ব্যবহার করছে। এর কিবোর্ড-ড্রিভেন ওয়ার্কফ্লো টিমের প্রজেক্ট ম্যানেজমেন্টের সময় ৪০% কমিয়ে দিয়েছে।
outcome_profit.client_testimonial: "কোডা আমাদের প্রজেক্ট ম্যানেজমেন্টের ধারণা পাল্টে দিয়েছে। এর স্পিড এবং ডিজাইন অতুলনীয়। আমাদের টিমের প্রোডাক্টিভিটি বহুগুণ বেড়েছে।" – সিটিও, টেকস্কেল ইঙ্ক.
outcome_profit.profit_metrics: The SaaS product generates $50,000+ MRR from 200+ paying teams. Customer acquisition cost (CAC) of $200 with Lifetime Value (LTV) of $3,500. User retention rate of 92% over 12 months. The freemium model converts at 15% to paid plans.

future_roadmap: Q1 2025: AI-powered issue auto-assignment and prioritization
Q2 2025: Native mobile apps (iOS & Android) with React Native
Q3 2025: Advanced workflow automation with no-code builder
Q4 2025: Portfolio management for multi-project teams
Q1 2026: Integration with 50+ third-party tools via Zapier/Make
Q2 2026: Custom fields and forms with validations
Q3 2026: Team analytics with predictive insights
Q4 2026: Enterprise SSO (SAML, OIDC, LDAP) and data residency options

development_process.team_size: 5 developers (2 Frontend, 2 Backend, 1 DevOps), 1 Designer, 1 Product Manager
development_process.development_timeline: 6 months from concept to v1.0 (MVP), 12 months to full GA
tools_used: Linear for our own project management (dogfooding)
GitHub for version control and code reviews
Vercel for preview deployments and hosting
Notion for documentation and knowledge base
testing_strategy: Integration tests: React Testing Library, Supertest
E2E tests: Playwright for critical user journeys
Performance tests: Lighthouse CI, k6 load testing
Security tests: OWASP dependency check, Snyk
Visual regression: Chromatic for UI components

projects4.name: জপশপ - মাল্টি টেন্যান্ট স্যাস প্ল্যাটফর্ম
projects4.tagline: ক্ষুদ্র ও মাঝারি ব্যবসার জন্য ইনভেন্টরি, সেলস এবং প্রফিট ম্যানেজমেন্ট প্ল্যাটফর্ম
projects4.overview: জপশপ একটি ক্লাউড-বেজড স্যাস (SaaS) প্ল্যাটফর্ম যা ছোট এবং মাঝারি ব্যবসার মালিকদের সহজেই তাদের ইনভেন্টরি, সেলস এবং লাভের হিসাব রাখতে সাহায্য করে।

architecture.frontend: Next.js 14 with App Router – optimized for multi-tenant routing, Server Components, React Server Components streaming, Tailwind CSS for pixel-perfect minimalist UI, shadcn/ui component library, Framer Motion for subtle animations
architecture.multi_tenant_strategy: Database-per-tenant with automatic connection routing, schema-based isolation via Prisma with tenant_id filtering, Redis caching with tenant-specific prefixes, custom domain support with wildcard subdomains (tenant.zopshop.com), subdomain routing middleware for authentication and data isolation
architecture.state_management: Zustand for client-side state (cart, filters, UI state), TanStack Query for server state with tenant-aware caching, Jotai for atomic state in complex forms
architecture.backend: Next.js API Routes (Serverless functions) with tRPC for type-safe APIs, Express.js microservices for heavy computation (report generation, batch processing), BullMQ for background jobs, webhook handlers with retry mechanisms
architecture.database: PostgreSQL with Prisma ORM and Migrate, read replicas for analytics queries, connection pooling via PgBouncer, Neon Database for serverless deployments, TimescaleDB for time-series sales data
architecture.authentication: NextAuth.js with role-based access (Super Admin, Tenant Admin, Manager, Cashier), JWT with tenant_id embedded, session storage in Redis, multi-factor authentication support
architecture.payment_subscription: Stripe Billing for subscription management (tiered pricing: Starter, Pro, Enterprise), Stripe Checkout for one-time payments, usage-based billing for enterprise, automated invoicing and dunning
architecture.email: Resend for transactional emails (invoices, low stock alerts, daily summaries), React Email for beautiful email templates, mailchimp integration for newsletters
architecture.file_storage: AWS S3 / Cloudinary for product images, invoice PDF generation, report exports (CSV, Excel, PDF), digital asset management with CDN caching
architecture.search: Meilisearch / Elasticsearch for full-text search across products, customers, and orders, fuzzy matching for product lookup in POS
architecture.reporting_analytics: Apache Superset for advanced business intelligence (self-hosted), Chart.js + Recharts for embedded dashboards, custom query builder for reports, scheduled report generation and email delivery
architecture.hosting_infrastructure: AWS ECS / Vercel (Frontend), AWS RDS Aurora (Primary DB), AWS ElastiCache (Redis), AWS SQS (Queue), AWS EventBridge (Event-driven architecture), Kubernetes (Enterprise deployments)
architecture.ci_cd: GitHub Actions with environment-specific deployments (dev/staging/prod), automated database migrations, blue-green deployment strategy, automated rollback on failure, security scanning and vulnerability assessment
architecture.monitoring_observability: Sentry for error tracking, Logtail for structured logging with tenant tags, Prometheus + Grafana for metrics, AWS CloudWatch for infrastructure monitoring, New Relic for APM, Uptime monitoring with ping checks

responsibilities: Designed and built the complete multi-tenant architecture with tenant isolation and database-per-tenant strategy
Created 50+ database tables including Tenants, Users, Products, Categories, Warehouses, Inventory, Sales, Invoices, Customers, Suppliers, Purchase Orders, etc.
Implemented the core inventory management system with real-time stock tracking, low stock alerts, and auto-reordering
Built the Point of Sale (POS) system with barcode scanning, quick product search, and customer lookup
Developed the comprehensive sales module with quotes, invoices, payments, and returns management
Created the profit analytics dashboard with 20+ metrics, charts, and customizable date ranges
Implemented role-based access control (RBAC) with 4 user roles and granular permissions
Built the reporting engine with 15+ pre-built reports (Sales by product, profit by category, inventory aging, etc.)
Developed the supplier management system with purchase orders and stock receiving
Created the customer management system with purchase history and loyalty points
Built the multi-warehouse support with inventory transfers and location tracking
Implemented the subscription billing system with Stripe (freemium, pro, enterprise tiers)
Built the import/export system for bulk product uploads (CSV, Excel) and data migration
Created the notification system with in-app alerts, email notifications, and SMS (Twilio)
Developed the audit log system tracking all changes for compliance
Built the custom domain support and white-labeling options for enterprise tenants
Implemented the real-time dashboard with WebSocket updates for sales and inventory changes
Created the tax engine supporting multiple tax types (VAT, GST, sales tax) and jurisdictions
Built the discount and coupon system with promo codes and bulk discounts
Developed the integration layer for third-party accounting (QuickBooks, Xero) and e-commerce (Shopify, WooCommerce)
challenges: Architecting a robust multi-tenant system that ensures complete data isolation while maintaining performance with shared infrastructure
Designing the inventory management system to handle complex scenarios like batch tracking, serial numbers, and expiry dates for perishable goods
Building a scalable POS system that works offline-first and syncs when connectivity is restored
Implementing the profit calculation engine that accurately tracks COGS (Cost of Goods Sold) using multiple costing methods (FIFO, LIFO, Weighted Average)
Creating a flexible reporting system that allows business owners to generate custom reports without SQL knowledge
Ensuring data consistency across distributed systems (orders, inventory, payments) with eventual consistency patterns
Building a seamless migration tool for SMBs transitioning from spreadsheets or legacy systems
Optimizing the product search to handle 1M+ products with real-time suggestions and faceted filtering
Implementing the returns and refunds workflow with restocking logic and financial adjustments
Designing the price management system supporting multiple price tiers, bulk discounts, and promotional pricing
Building a responsive mobile experience that functions as a full-featured POS on tablets
Implementing the role-based access control with 100+ permission checks across the application
Creating a scalable notification system that handles 100,000+ events daily without performance degradation
Managing the complex state of a multi-step checkout/order process with optimistic updates and rollback capabilities
Developing the integration with 5+ payment gateways (Stripe, PayPal, Razorpay, Bkash, Nagad) with unified API

multi_tenant_management: Tenant onboarding with automated database provisioning
Multi-location support for businesses with multiple outlets
inventory_management: Product catalog with categories, brands, tags, and attributes
Real-time inventory tracking across multiple warehouses
Stock movements with audit trail (adjustments, transfers, write-offs)
Low stock alerts and automated reordering
Serial number tracking for high-value items
Product variants (size, color, style) with individual stock
Stock receiving with quality check workflow
Inventory valuation using FIFO, LIFO, Weighted Average
sales_management: Point of Sale (POS) with offline support
Quick product search with barcode scanning
Customer lookup and creation on the fly
Cart management with add/remove, discounts, and holds
Multiple payment methods (cash, card, digital wallets)
Order management with status tracking (pending, confirmed, shipped, delivered)
Sales returns and refunds with restocking
Sales quotations and estimates (convert to order)
Sales history with comprehensive filtering and search
Customer loyalty program with point accumulation
profit_analytics: Profit by product, category, brand, location
Inventory turnover and days sales inventory (DSI)
Custom reports with filters and dimensions
Scheduled report delivery (PDF, Excel) via email
customer_management: Loyalty program with tiers (Bronze, Silver, Gold)
Email and SMS marketing integration (Mailchimp, Twilio)
supplier_management: Supplier profiles with contact details and ratings
Purchase orders (PO) with items and quantities
PO status tracking (draft, ordered, received, partially received)
finance_accounting: Financial year closing and P&L statements
Integration with QuickBooks Online and Xero

relationships: Tenants have many Users, Warehouses, Products, Customers, Suppliers, SalesOrders, Invoices
Users belong to one Tenant
Products belong to one Tenant, Category, Brand
Products have many Variants, Inventory records, InventoryMovements
Warehouses belong to one Tenant
Inventory records link Product, Variant, and Warehouse
PurchaseOrders belong to one Tenant and Supplier
PurchaseOrderItems link PurchaseOrder, Product, Variant
SalesOrders belong to one Tenant, Customer, User
SalesOrderItems link SalesOrder, Product, Variant, Warehouse
Payments belong to one Tenant, SalesOrder, Customer
Invoices belong to one Tenant and SalesOrder
Returns belong to one Tenant, SalesOrder, Customer
ReturnItems link Return and SalesOrderItem
AuditLogs belong to one Tenant and User
Notifications belong to one Tenant and User

products.description: Get all products with pagination and filters

inventory.description: Get products with low stock alerts

sales.description: Quick POS sale with multiple items

customers.description: Get customer details with purchase history

frontend: React Server Components to minimize client-side JavaScript
Streaming SSR with Suspense for critical dashboards
Incremental Static Regeneration (ISR) for product pages
Image optimization with next/image and WebP conversion
Code splitting with dynamic imports for heavy components (charts, reports)
Virtual scrolling for large product lists
Debounced search and filter operations
Optimistic UI updates for better perceived performance
Prefetching of dashboard data for logged-in users
Edge caching via Vercel Edge Network
Service Worker for offline POS support
Browser caching strategies with Cache-Control headers
backend: Database indexing on frequently queried fields (tenant_id, product_id, sales_order_id)
Query optimization with Prisma's include/select and raw SQL for complex queries
Redis caching for tenant configurations, product lookups, and session data
Database connection pooling with PgBouncer
Read replicas for analytics and reporting queries
Background job processing with BullMQ for heavy tasks (report generation, email notifications)
Materialized views for frequently used analytics queries
Partitioning by tenant_id for large tables
Full-text search with Meilisearch for instant product search
Batch processing for inventory updates and bulk imports
multi_tenant: Database-per-tenant with connection routing for isolation
Tenant-aware caching with Redis key prefixes
Schema-based isolation with Prisma's tenant_id filter
Subdomain routing with middleware for tenant detection
Sharding strategy for high-scale Enterprise tenants

security_features: JWT authentication with tenant_id embedded in token
Role-based access control with 100+ granular permissions
Tenant isolation with database-per-tenant (no cross-tenant data leakage)
Input validation with Zod and sanitization
CSRF protection with double-submit cookies
Rate limiting per tenant (2000 requests per minute)
Helmet.js for security headers
CORS with allowed origins per tenant
Content Security Policy (CSP) headers
SQL injection prevention via Prisma ORM
XSS protection through React's built-in sanitization
Secure cookie flags (HttpOnly, Secure, SameSite=Strict)
2FA support for admin accounts (TOTP)
Session management with device tracking
Audit logging for all sensitive actions (access, modifications)
Data encryption at rest (database-level and S3 encryption)
End-to-end encryption for sensitive business data
OAuth integration for SSO (Google, Microsoft)
Brute force protection on auth endpoints
Email verification required for account activation
Password reset flow with expiring tokens
Compliance with GDPR and CCPA (data export and deletion)
SOC2 compliance for enterprise tenants

outcome_profit.business_impact: ZopShop has empowered 500+ SMBs to take control of their business operations, leading to an average 30% increase in operational efficiency and 15% reduction in inventory holding costs. The platform's intuitive design has enabled business owners without technical backgrounds to generate complex reports and insights within minutes.
outcome_profit.client_testimonial: "ZopShop revolutionized how we manage our retail business. From tracking inventory across 3 locations to understanding our profit margins, everything is now at our fingertips. The minimalist UI makes it so easy for our staff to use without extensive training." – Operations Director, SmartRetail Solutions
outcome_profit.profit_metrics: Platform generates $75,000+ MRR from 500+ paying businesses. Average revenue per user (ARPU) of $150/month. Customer acquisition cost (CAC) of $350 with Lifetime Value (LTV) of $8,400 (48-month average retention). Monthly churn rate of 3% (industry average 5-7%).

future_roadmap: Q1 2025: AI-powered demand forecasting and auto-replenishment
Q2 2025: Native mobile app for Android/iOS (inventory scanning, quick sales)
Q3 2025: Integration with major e-commerce platforms (Shopify, WooCommerce, Magento)
Q4 2025: Advanced accounting module with bank reconciliation
Q1 2026: Multi-currency and international tax support
Q2 2026: B2B e-commerce portal for wholesale customers
Q3 2026: AI chatbot for customer support and order assistance
Q4 2026: Advanced analytics with AI-powered business recommendations
Q1 2027: IoT integration for smart inventory tracking (sensors, RFID)
Q2 2027: Expanded POS features with hardware integration (receipt printers, cash drawers)

development_process.methodology: Agile Scrum with 2-week sprints, continuous delivery
development_process.team_size: 8 developers (3 Frontend, 3 Backend, 1 DevOps, 1 QA), 1 Product Manager, 1 UI/UX Designer, 1 Business Analyst
development_process.development_timeline: 6 months to MVP (launch with core features), 12 months to v2.0 (with full feature set)
tools_used: GitHub for version control with PR reviews
Vercel for frontend hosting and preview deployments
AWS for backend infrastructure (EC2, RDS, S3, ElastiCache)
Logtail for structured logging with tenant tagging
PostHog for product analytics and feature flags
Stripe for payment processing and subscription management
testing_strategy: Unit tests: Vitest with 85% coverage target
Integration tests: React Testing Library, Supertest for API testing
E2E tests: Playwright with critical user journeys
Load testing: k6 for 10,000 concurrent users simulation
Security testing: OWASP dependency check, Snyk, SonarQube
Performance testing: Lighthouse CI in CI/CD pipeline
